appraisal_events.evidence: « Elle n’est pas gentille du tout… elle ne vaut pas la peine que tu t’occupes d’elle »; « ce n’est plus mon duchesse de Guermantes d’autrefois »
appraisal_events.explanation: Saint-Loup explicitly belittles the duchess, advising the narrator against being interested in her and suggesting she is inferior to another cousin.

status_effects.explanation: In the worldly register evoked by Saint-Loup, she is devalued and presented as not deserving the narrator's attention.
